title: Buttery Naan Flatbread
description: Soft and flaky Indian-style flatbread, perfect for sopping up curries or serving alongside your favorite dishes.
instructions: Roll out the naan slightly to help it spread evenly.
Spread the softened butter evenly over the naan.
If desired, sprinkle crumbled bread on top of the butter.
Transfer the naan to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 8-10 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Slice into smaller pieces and serve warm.
